mapper.select: SELECT dept_id, dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, dept_path, seq, create_time, update_time FROM department ORDER BY dept_path, seq
SELECT dept_id, dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, dept_path, seq FROM department WHERE dept_path LIKE CONCAT(#{deptId}, '%') ORDER BY dept_path, seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, dept_path, seq) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{parentDeptId}, #{deptLevel}, #{deptPath}, #{seq})
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET dept_path = #{deptPath}, dept_level = #{deptLevel} WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
